titleStmt.title: SII 8.412: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 412. (A.R. No. 126 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2vatu nāyaṉār cokkanāyaṉā rakampaṭimutalikaḷil lanāya
ka ṉellāntaruvāṉāṉa teṉṉakaṅkatevaṉum curanāṭṭu cuḻivarakaṇṭanil Ūrā yicai nta vūromum Eṅkaḷ nāyaṉār tiruvakatticuramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkuk kuṭu
tta tevatāṉam taccaṉkuḷamum vayalum Ikkuḷattuk kellai kiḻpāṟkellai kaṇiyāṉkuḷattu varampiṭukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pāṟaikku vaṭakkum me
lpāṟkellai pāṇanvayalil varampiṭukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai yikkuḷattu vaṭakaṭaiyiṟ pāṟaikkuṭpaṭṭa vaṅkārattu varampiṭukkut teṟkum Āka vicainta perunāṉkel
laik kuṭpaṭṭa nilam tirucculakkallu nāṭṭit tirumalaiyile yeḻuttum veṭṭivittu Eṭṭāvatu kaṭamai yantarāya muṭpaṭa Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāvatāka kuṭuttom . Itu koṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉāk
ku �ṉāḻiyum tampirāṭṭiyāṟku Irunāḻiyum viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟkum kuṉṟameṟintapiḷḷaiyāṟkum vaṭukappiḷḷaiyāṟkum Āka varici yaṟunāḻiyum Āka Arici paṉṉirunāḻiyum Itu
kku veṇṭum paṭi viñcaṉaṅkaḷum cāttuppapṭi pūccuppaṭiyum cantiyātipa meḻu muṭpaṭa yikkuḷaṅ koṇṭu ciṟukālaiccantikkum Ucciccantikkum yellāntaruvāncanti Ippaṭi cantirāti
ttavarai celvatākak kuṭuttom teṉṉakaṅkatevaṉeṉum Ūrā yicainta vūromum tiruvakatticuramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku . Itu paṉmākecura raṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.412 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
